disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid increase in abdominal girth over 48 hours with a tight, distended, stretched belly
trigger_question_examples: How quickly has your belly changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My belly has blown up really fast over the last two days — it's tight and stretched and shiny, much bigger than normal.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe breathlessness at rest and orthopnoea — unable to lie flat, relieved only by sitting bolt upright
trigger_question_examples: Can you lie flat, or does that make breathing worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't breathe when I lie down — I have to sit bolt upright in the recliner all the time, and even sitting up I'm puffing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persistent deep pelvic pain for three months, initially dismissed as indigestion
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any pain, and for how long?
Tell me about the pain low down.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a constant tearing pain deep in my pelvis. A dull ache down there started about three months ago but I thought it was just indigestion.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Early satiety plus unintentional 5 kg weight loss despite increasing abdominal girth
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I fill up after just a few bites now, and I've lost about 5 kg without trying — even though my belly has got bigger.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New-onset urinary frequency over the past week
trigger_question_examples: Are you passing urine more often than usual?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've been needing to wee much more often this past week.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one at home; feels weak and unsteady with a high perceived fall risk
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone at home with you?
How are you managing to move around?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own, there's no one here. I feel so weak and off-balance with this belly that I'm scared I'll fall.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Antacids and paracetamol taken with no effect on the pain or swelling
trigger_question_examples: Have you taken anything for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking antacids and paracetamol but they've done absolutely nothing.

patient_initiated_exchanges.trigger_condition: If the AI Doctor asks about lying down or positioning
patient_initiated_exchanges.patient_text: Is it bad that I can only breathe sitting straight up? Should I be this scared?
patient_initiated_exchanges.expected_ai_doctor_response_quality: Recognises orthopnoea with rapid abdominal distension as an emergency, validates concern, and moves to arrange urgent emergency assessment rather than reassuring or deferring.
